backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the school result management system with CRUD operations for schools, teachers, students, results, and user profiles, protected by role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, key fixes, and notable UI details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Vidyarthi Online Nikal 2026' that mounts the React root and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in AuthProvider, handles role-based page navigation guards (students restricted to result-print, non-admins blocked from teacher-manage), and renders the appropriate page inside DashboardLayout.
frontend/src/components/ReportCard.tsx: Printable report card component that displays school info, student details, and semester-wise subject grades in a structured layout using SchoolExtra, StudentExtra, and ResultExtra types.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing authentication state (admin/teacher/student sessions) with login/logout functions backed by sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity and an admin token from URL params, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status flags to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations (add, update, delete, fetch) on schools, teachers, students, results, and teacher logins, all backed by localStorage helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts, configures Tailwind with custom OKLCH CSS variables for light/dark themes, and defines utility classes for gradients and print styles.
frontend/src/layouts/DashboardLayout.tsx: Responsive dashboard shell with a collapsible sidebar, role-based navigation items (admin/teacher/student), user info display, and a logout button wrapping page content.
frontend/src/lib/localStorage.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and localStorage CRUD helpers for schools, teachers, students, results, and teacher logins, including auto-incrementing ID counters persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/EnterResultPage.tsx: Page for entering and managing student semester results, featuring a table of existing results and a dialog form with per-subject grade selectors and text fields for two semesters, using React Query mutations for persistence.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard home page displaying stats cards (total students, results entered, results pending) and a progress bar, filtered by school UDISE for teachers or showing all schools for admins.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with three tabs (Admin, Teacher, Student) each with their own form and validation logic, authenticating users via hardcoded credentials or localStorage data.
frontend/src/pages/ProgressReportPage.ts: Page for searching and displaying a student's progress report card by filtering on UDISE, class, division, and attendance number, with print and HTML download functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolInfoPage.tsx: CRUD management page for school records, showing a table of schools with add/edit dialogs and a delete confirmation dialog using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/StudentInfoPage.tsx: CRUD management page for student records with a form that auto-populates school and teacher details based on selected UDISE, supporting add, edit, and delete operations via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/StudentResultPrintPag: Page that allows searching for a student's result by UDISE, class, division, and attendance number, then displays a printable/downloadable report card. Auto-fills and auto-searches for logged-in student role users.
frontend/src/pages/TeacherInfoPage.tsx: CRUD page for managing teacher records (name, DOB, class, division, mobile, UDISE), with add/edit dialog and delete confirmation, auto-populating school name/taluka/district from UDISE lookup.
frontend/src/pages/TeacherManagePage.tsx: Admin-only page for managing teacher login credentials (UDISE + mobile), with access guard that blocks non-admin users and provides add/edit/delete functionality for TeacherLogin records.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, Devanagari/Poppins fonts, custom shadows, and fade-in/slide-in animations, using typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a school management app with pending feature requests (AR-1 through AR-14+) for teacher login via mobile+UDISE and per-UDISE data filtering across all pages.
